reviews.review_title: Amazingly beautiful to see the Holy Land
reviews.review_description: This is an ideal tour for those who'd like to see many historical sites coupled with interesting facts but lack the ability to get there (or are even preparing to go!). It's much cheaper than traveling there in person as well. There are so many locations to see, and I enjoy that each section is tied in some way to the next. This makes it actually feel like a tour. I can know my way around even before making my first real visit!

Well worth the price for the experience of seeing sights I've read about so often, but likely will never be able to personally visit. There are many sites that I would like to see that aren't included, but I guess that's what Part Two is for. When will that be available?

The 45 immersive images, paired with audio guides, make me feel like I’m actually there. The best part is I can revisit anytime I want—without the travel or hassle. I’m excited to see more tours added in the future!
